sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3754" key="a)/ktitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄκτῐτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄκτιστος</foreign>, <sense id="n3754.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">untilled,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">h.Ven.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">123</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
